details.test: Task 1: Add 3 commuter helmets under $80 with 4+ stars to comparison list
Task 2: Save training plan and post a comment
Task 3: Choose discounted product, save to wishlist, and get discount code
Task 4: Subscribe to weekly maintenance tips newsletter with interests

Task 7: Save article to reading list with Weekend project tag
